description: Standing cofounder-eye LLM-judgment leaf (PROTOTYPE): enumerates the core use cases from specs/product/mvp.md and, for EACH, judges whether it is wired END-TO-END in the built system — a real user could get from entry point to outcome — versus merely present as components/routes/passing unit tests. The enumerative complement to review.viability: less 'does it add up?', more 'go down the list and check each journey actually connects.' MILESTONE-AWARE: an incomplete MVP journey is expected at ordinary-development and gates only at the rung where we'd claim it; a journey that's supposed to work already but is broken gates now. The harness gates relative to milestone.json's current rung.
